sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT L4_switch_type
FROM dbo.vb_tbl_job a
JOIN dbo.vb_tbl_trigger b ON a.trigger_id=b.trigger_id
WHERE b.trigger_name='@{pipeline().parameters.Trigger}'

SELECT DISTINCT L3_switch_type
FROM dbo.vb_tbl_job a
JOIN dbo.vb_tbl_trigger b ON a.trigger_id=b.trigger_id
WHERE b.trigger_name='@{pipeline().parameters.Trigger}'

SELECT DISTINCT L2_switch_type
FROM dbo.vb_tbl_job a
JOIN dbo.vb_tbl_trigger b ON a.trigger_id=b.trigger_id
WHERE b.trigger_name='@{pipeline().parameters.Trigger}'
SELECT WatermarkValue FROM dbo.watermarktable WHERE TableName='olist_orders_dataset'
SELECT MAX(modified_date) AS NewWatermarkValue FROM dbo.olist_orders_dataset

SELECT * FROM dbo.olist_orders_dataset
WHERE modified_date > '@{activity('LKUP_OLD_WM').output.firstRow.WatermarkValue}'
  AND modified_date <= '@{activity('LKUP_NEW_WM').output.firstRow.NewWatermarkValue}'
